posts.title: CORNYN REBUKES Lee OVER SAVE ACT: Sen. John Cornyn tells Sen. Mike Lee he backs the SAVE America Act yet lacks votes needed, calling it math and arguing Republican infighting damages prospects for winning the majority in November.

quotedTweet.content:
We will *not* regret putting in the hard work to pass the SAVE America Act—even though it will take weeks, requiring hard work.

We will regret *not* passing it.

Are the long weekends and recesses really worth losing our country?

Of course not.

@LeaderJohnThune, let’s do this!

twitter.content: Mike, I am a co-sponsor and have repeatedly voted for this but you don’t have the votes. @LeaderJohnThune can’t change that. It is math. Try focusing on Democrats instead of Republicans.  Republican on Republican attacks are hurting our chances to win the majority in November.
